zh.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu是Jacques Mahieu和Jenne的女兒，於大約1585年出生在英國肯特坎特布瑞。她於1603年7月20日之後與Francis Cooke在荷蘭霍蘭萊登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1623年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。她去世於從1666年6月8日到1675年12月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu是Jacques Mahieu和Jenne的女儿，于大约1585年出生在英国肯特坎特布瑞。她于1603年7月20日之后与Francis Cooke在荷兰霍蘭萊登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1623年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。她去世于从1666年6月8日到1675年12月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Mahieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Raoul, Armand, Pierre.
French (northern), Walloon, and Flemish: variant of   Mathieu  .
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Mathieu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Normand, Andre, Lucien, Pierre, Yvon, Armand, Rosaire, Alphonse, Dominique, Emile, Fernand.
French and Walloon: from the French personal name Mathieu, vernacular derivative of Latin Mathias or Matthaeus (see Matthew ). Compare Matthieu .

nameMeanings.name: Hester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Esther , of medieval origin. For a long while the two forms were interchangeable, the addition or dropping of h- being commonplace in a whole range of words, but now they are generally regarded as two distinct names.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu was born about 1585, in Canterbury, Kent, England as the daughter of Jacques Mahieu and Jenne. She married Francis Cooke after 20 July 1603, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1623. She died from 8 June 1666 to 18 December 1675, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu est née environ 1585, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, fille de Jacques Mahieu et Jenne. Elle a épousé Francis Cooke après 20 juillet 1603, à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1623. Elle est décédée du 8 juin 1666 au 18 décembre 1675, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Sie starb von 8. Juni 1666 bis 18. Dezember 1675 in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu è nata il circa 1585 nel Canterbury, Kent, England come figlia di Jacques Mahieu e Jenne. Lei sposato Francis Cooke dopo il 20 luglio 1603, nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Immigrata nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1623. Morì da 8 giugno 1666 a 18 dicembre 1675, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieuは約1585年にイギリスケントカンテルブリーでJacques MahieuとJenneの娘として生まれた。1603年7月20日以後にオランダホーランドレイデンでFrancis Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1623年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。彼女はから1666年6月8日まで1675年12月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで死去した。

ko.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스
ko.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu(은)는 대략 1585년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 Jacques Mahieu(와)과 Jenne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1603년 7월 20일 이후 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 Francis Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1623년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1666년 6월 8일부터 1675년 12월 18일까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu nasceu aproximadamente 1585, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra filha de Jacques Mahieu e Jenne. Ela casou-se com Francis Cooke após 20 de julho de 1603, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1623. Ela faleceu de 8 de junho de 1666 a 18 de dezembro de 1675, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Hester Mahieu родилась около 1585 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали Jacques Mahieu и Jenne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Cooke после 20 июля 1603 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она иммигрировала в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1623 году. Она умерла с 8 июня 1666 по 18 декабря 1675 в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
